description: Number of PSMs and protein groups found in each raw file.
Metadata from experiment and how samples were grouped together.
Abundances of all sites/proteins identified by FragPipe divided into Light and Heavy.
One-sample t.test on SILAC ratios to test for difference between a ratio of 0 (no change).
Unique sites/proteins in each group. Group collumn refers to which group this site/protein was identified.
Output from one-sample t.test in wide format for more human readable friendly data. You should have one sheet per group specified in metadata.csv.
